rationale: API ergonomics improvement: transforming internal topology error into user-facing client error; no spec rule violated.
ExtJSON parser bug with empty object handling; internal parsing bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
Repository restructuring for public API and documentation organization; purely internal refactor.
Documentation references private function; doc-only issue, no spec involvement.
Documentation outdated claiming batching not supported; doc-only fix, no spec rule.
BSON decoding of javascript type into bson.D fails; internal codec bug, no specific BSON spec rule named.
API type restriction (SetResumeAfter takes bsonx.Doc instead of interface{}); API design issue, not spec conformance.
Connection pool options wiring and API design; mentions 'consistency with other drivers' but about API surface, not spec behavioral divergence.
Panic in change stream when _id field is ObjectID and $replaceRoot used; implementation crash bug, not spec rule violation.
API design consistency: RunCommand should return *DocumentResult like FindOne; internal API ergonomics, not spec.
Client creation API refactor to simplify NewClient functions; purely internal API redesign.
Change stream spec updated: startAtOperationTime must be omitted at creation, set from operationTime on resume; driver had wrong default behavior.
Change stream spec: batchSize must be passed to cursor, not $changeStream stage; driver sent it to wrong location causing server error.
GridFS reads int64 values but tries to decode as int32; implementation type handling bug, no specific GridFS spec rule contradicted.
Improving BSON transition error messages for debugging; internal error quality improvement, no spec rule.
Nil pointer dereference/panic in changeStream Close when cursor is nil; implementation crash bug, not spec deviation.
MarshalBSON not called for non-primitive types in bson.D; internal codec invocation bug, thin description, no named spec rule.
EmptyInterfaceEncoder panics on nil; implementation nil-handling bug in BSON encoder, no spec rule specified.
Package consolidation of objectid and decimal into primitive package; internal refactor, no spec involvement.
Incorrect docstring on Raw.Lookup return type; documentation-only fix, no spec rule.
UnmarshalExtJSON fails on multi-element array; internal ExtJSON parsing bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
InsertedID returns bsonx type instead of bson package type; internal API type mismatch, not a spec rule violation.
BSON decoder zeroes struct before unmarshalling, inconsistent with Go serialization tools; implementation behavior, no BSON spec rule about struct zeroing.
Adding pointer support for reflect.Kind types in BSON codecs; internal codec feature addition, not spec conformance.
Cannot decode null ObjectID field; implementation codec bug with null handling, no specific BSON spec rule for null-to-ObjectID decoding.
Cannot decode nil into pointer types or *ObjectID; internal codec missing type assertion; no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
lookupInterfaceDecoder fails to ensure pointer type for custom unmarshaler proxy types; implementation bug in codec lookup.
Refactoring ValueEncoder/ValueDecoder to use reflect.Value instead of interface{}; internal API refactor.
Unmarshaling arrays/objects into bson.D yields bsonx types instead of primitives; internal type handling, not spec rule.
Moving bson.D type family to primitive package; internal package refactoring.
Deprecated bson.NewDocument still in documentation examples; doc-only cleanup.
Spec requires write concern only sent for aggregate with $out stage; driver sends it unconditionally causing server error.
Adding dep dependency management support; build/packaging infrastructure change.
ValueReader doesn't support ReadValueBytes on top-level document; internal BSON API feature, no spec rule violated.
Extending Marshal/Unmarshal family with context-aware functions; API extension, not spec conformance.
Updating README.md with usage instructions and examples; documentation-only improvement.
Nil pointer panic when type implements Zeroer interface as value; implementation nil-safety bug, no BSON spec rule.
Panic marshaling nil ObjectID in struct; implementation crash bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
Limiting 'connect' URI values to 'automatic'/'direct'; mentions other drivers don't use 'single'/'auto' but this is API cleanup, not behavioral divergence.
Adding documentation for bsoncodec package; documentation-only improvement.
ArrayEncodeValue/SliceEncodeValue don't handle nil primitive.E.Value; implementation nil-handling bug in BSON encoder.
Making CommandMetadata struct private; internal API visibility change, no spec rule.
SingleResult.Decode panics with nil registry; implementation initialization bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Implementing legacy index enumeration for 3.0 support; feature addition for older server versions, no spec violation.
JSON scanner fails when reader returns io.EOF with partial bytes (gzip.Reader edge case); implementation IO handling bug.
Server Selection spec: Topology Type Single should allow reads without explicit readPreference; driver requires slaveOk/readPreference=secondary for direct connect.
Aggregate doesn't accept bson.A as pipeline; internal type conversion bug in pipeline handling, no spec rule contradicted.
ReadPreference set programmatically on client is ignored; spec requires client-level read preference to be respected for server selection.
KillCursors doesn't close connection lease causing non-deterministic hangs in Disconnect; resource leak bug, no spec rule about connection release timing.
Unmarshaling to interface{} fails with invalid type 0x00; internal empty interface decoder bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.
